header.title: Our
header.subtitle: Our leadership team bridges the gap between clinical excellence and sustainable operational growth, empowering facility owners to reclaim their therapy departments through proven in-house transition models.

paragraphs: Evolve Therapy Services is a therapy management company dedicated to helping LTC organizations excite and empower their therapy teams through an in-house employment model with opportunities for career advancement through mentorship.
Our model facilitates a cohesive company culture that generates exceptional outcomes, all while allowing facilities to retain 100% of their therapy revenue.
intro.quote: We bridge the gap between clinical quality and financial performance, enabling operators to truly evolve to the next level.

pillars.title: Our Vision
pillars.text: To provide the most rewarding and creative therapy consulting management model through leadership, passion, and experience to allow success and internal growth for our customers.

pillars.title: Our Mission
pillars.text: To provide the highest quality customer-centric, outcome-based therapy management services enabling our customers the ability to focus on their core strengths through a dynamic culture.

pillars.title: Our Commitment
pillars.text: We are committed to clinical integrity, operational transparency, and building genuine partnerships where your facility's success is our success.

leaders.name: Lisa Bebie, PTA
leaders.title: President & Founder
leaders.quote: As a clinician, I know how difficult it was to meet the goals of my employer as well as try to meet the goals of my customer. We know that a model that brings your therapy teams in-house allows great employee engagement, which then in turn, allows exceptional therapy outcomes to the residents we all serve.
bio: Over 20 years of long-term therapy leadership with a passionate commitment to evolve the functionality of therapy services for the aging population.
Operational and clinical expertise in leadership and marketing models created by exceptional clinical programming—setting customers apart through a holistic philosophy.

It is her vision to bridge the gap for operators who want to take their therapy teams in-house, and to assist in-house programs with clinically proven education, operational analysis, and compliance oversight.

leaders.name: Isaiah Rupp, MBA-HCA, PTA
leaders.title: VP of Operations & Co-Founder
leaders.quote: As Director of Operations my passion is in building the best clinical outcomes and operations success in the most fiscally responsible manner. My vision is to promote/build a place of stability where clinicians can thrive in doing what they have a passion to do.
bio: With an MBA in Healthcare Administration from South University and as a licensed Physical Therapist Assistant, Isaiah serves as Evolve's Director of Operations.
He oversees all therapy operations, working to build strong clinical, operational, and business strategies—progressing quickly due to his ability to teach, train, and build up those around him.
His leadership ensures compliance metrics are met while prioritizing holistic patient outcomes, cementing Evolve as a premier clinical partner across the therapeutic landscape.

philosophy.description: We believe that providing your resident population with high-end, clinically proven therapy should not mean sacrificing your facility's bottom line.

items.title: Patient Triage
items.desc: Prioritizing the residents who need immediate therapeutic intervention.

items.title: Financial Growth
items.desc: Retaining your hard earned revenue via targeted resource utilization.

items.title: Audit Defense
items.desc: Preparing and defending against arbitrary regulatory audits proactively.

national.quote: Our regional directors are strategically deployed across the United States to ensure that every facility under our oversight carries the same Evolve Standard.

journey.subtitle: From a single facility audit to a national clinical management firm, our journey has been defined by a commitment to clinical truth and operational excellence.

items.text: Years of LTC expertise in clinical leadership and management.
States served with active clinical oversight and recruitment support.
Revenue retention for every facility we've successfully transitioned.

cta.title: The Evolve
cta.subtitle: Connect with our leadership team today to learn how our clinical oversight model can secure your facility's future.
